q: Do you take photos of good views?
examiner_note: Câu hỏi này liên kết giữa sở thích ngắm cảnh và thói quen sử dụng công nghệ (nhiếp ảnh). Bạn có thể nói về việc lưu giữ kỷ niệm (preserving memories) hay chia sẻ lên mạng xã hội (social media). Hãy thể hiện quan điểm cá nhân: Bạn là người thích 'chụp mọi lúc mọi nơi' hay là người thích 'sống trọn khoảnh khắc' hơn. Sử dụng các thuật ngữ nhiếp ảnh như 'composition', 'framing' sẽ giúp câu trả lời chuyên nghiệp hơn.

band7.text: Definitely! I’m a big fan of photography, so whenever I see a beautiful view, I'll take a few photos with my phone. It’s a great way to keep those memories and share them with my friends on Facebook or Instagram.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, có mục đích rõ ràng (kỷ niệm, chia sẻ). Sử dụng từ vựng tự nhiên.

band8.text: Yes, I practically can't resist. Whenever I encounter a stunning landscape, I feel compelled to capture it. I think photography adds another layer of appreciation to the view because you have to think about composition and framing. Plus, looking back at those photos later always brings back that sense of wonder.
band8.note: Sử dụng các cụm từ tốt như 'can't resist', 'feel compelled', 'adds another layer of appreciation', 'composition and framing'. Cách diễn đạt mạch lạc.

band9.text: Absolutely, I’m quite a photography enthusiast, so I often strive to document the scenic beauty I encounter. However, I try to strike a balance between capturing the perfect shot and actually immersing myself in the moment. While I appreciate the technical aspects like lighting and perspective, I believe the raw emotional connection to a landscape is something that a camera lens can sometimes fail to replicate entirely.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng ở trình độ cao (enthusiast, document, strike a balance, immersing, technical aspects, replicate entirely). Thể hiện quan điểm triết lý và sự tinh tế.

v.example: I can't resist taking a photo when the sunset is that beautiful.

v.meaning: cảm thấy bị thôi thúc phải làm gì
v.example: I feel compelled to share my travel photos with my family.
Good composition is the key to a great photograph.

v.meaning: cách đóng khung/căn chỉnh khung hình
v.example: The trees provided a natural framing for the mountain in the photo.
As a photography enthusiast, she carries her camera everywhere.
I love to document my travels through my blog.
It's important to strike a balance between work and play.
You should immerse yourself in the local culture when traveling.
A wide-angle camera lens is perfect for landscapes.
No photo can truly replicate the feeling of being there in person.
Photos are the best way to preserve memories of our holiday.

v.ipa: thẩm mỹ về mặt thị giác
v.example: The visual aesthetics of the movie were absolutely stunning.
Modern smartphones can take high resolution photos.
I use a professional editing app to enhance my photos.
Filters can enhance the colors of a sunset photo.
I always post my best vacation shots on social media.
Candid shots often capture the true emotion of a moment.
Most scenic views look better in landscape orientation.
Portrait mode creates a beautiful blurred background.
A shallow depth of field is great for focusing on a single flower.
The lighting conditions were perfect for an outdoor photoshoot.
The sky in the photo is overexposed and looks completely white.
The forest was too dark, so the photos came out underexposed.
You need a fast shutter speed to capture moving water.
Adjusting the aperture changes how much light enters the camera.
In low light, you might need to increase the ISO settings.
I use a tripod for long exposure shots of the night sky.
I prefer looking through the viewfinder rather than the screen.
The autofocus on this camera is incredibly fast.
The bright red barn is the focal point of the landscape.
I took a panoramic shot to capture the whole mountain range.
We made a time-lapse of the clouds moving over the valley.
Everyone was taking selfies in front of the Eiffel Tower.
My grandmother still keeps all her photos in a physical photo album.

v.meaning: bộ sưu tập ảnh kỹ thuật số
v.example: My phone's digital gallery is full of pictures of my cat.
Make sure you have enough space on your memory card.
I use cloud backup so I never lose my precious photos.

v.meaning: đáng giá ngàn lời nói (hình ảnh có sức mạnh)
v.example: They say a picture is worth a thousand words.

v.meaning: ghi lại được cái hồn/bản chất
v.example: The photographer really captured the essence of the city.
A good photograph makes a moment feel frozen in time.
Wait! Let me snap a photo of this sunset before it's gone.
Some people are just naturally very photogenic.
I like using a black and white filter for a dramatic look.
The bird was too far away, so I had to be zoomed in.
The background is out of focus, which makes the subject stand out.
The details in this high-quality print are incredibly sharp.
Photos taken in very low light often look grainy.
The colors in her paintings are always so vivid.
The view from the summit was an unforgettable experience.
Sometimes it's better to put down the phone and just live in the moment.
